title: stellaria graminea var. graminea
intro: Stellaria graminea var. graminea, commonly known as lesser stitchwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Stellaria graminea var. graminea is often used as a raw ingredient in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses and preparation methods may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
